Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Aug-14-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Accounting
Off Calendar Aug-18-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Nadia Lama. Seth Skootsky specially appearing for Claudia Parakka (Trustee).

Mr. Skootksy stated that he was asked to appear by Litigation Counsel in case Mr. Lopin did not make an appearance. Mr. Freedman stated that the case settled, that there was a provision that a grant deed would be recorded transferring the property to his Client, that is has not happened and that he is concerned about performance. Mr. Freedman also stated that he was okay with these petitions going off calendar, that he will come back into to Court if there is no performance and that they have a settlement on the Minor's interest as well. Status on filing of the accounting and the issue of Attorney's fees were taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Issue Of Attorney'S Fees

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Jul-10-2014 Continued To Sep-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Accounting
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Continued To Aug-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for Nadia Lama. Loren Lopin for Claudia Lama (Trustee).

Counsel represented to the Court that they agree to a continuance. Mr. Lopin stated that the Parties are attempting to get to mediation and attempting global settlement, that the accounting was filed, that he is in full compliance with Judge Busch's order and that they are trying to do mediation in mid July. The Court informed Mr. Lopin that the petition for settlement of account needs to be filed within three weeks. Status on filing of the accounting and the issue of attorney's fees were continued to August 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Stewart. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions: 1. To Compel Trustee To Account; 2. Distribution To Minor Cutma; 3. For Payment Of Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Feb-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Nadia Lama. Loren Lopin for and with Claudia Lama (Respondent).

Mr. Lopin stated that he provided proof of insurance and an accounting on Friday, and that he will provide an accounting on the Survivor's Trust in 60-days. Mr. Freedman stated that since the date of death there has been a business which has been generating income, that the Minor is entitled to 50% of that income, that they have never had an accounting of the business and that there is no verification that the income is being preserved for the Minor for a year and a half. Counsel also presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the issue of attorney's fees and whether the Trust should pay for said fees or whether each Party should bear their own costs. In addition, Mr. Freedman stated that his Client is part owner of the liqour license, that the liqour license is not part of the Trust but that it ends up being before the Court because the business is managed by the Trust and being operated by the Trustee. The Court informed Mr. Freedman that no particular amount of attorney's fees were presented. Mr. Lopin stated that the matter involves 10 properties, that it has taken time to put things in order and nothing is withheld, and that he will seek Court approval of the accountings. The Court granted the petition to the extent it seeks an accounting. The accounting is to be provided no later than April 7, 2014. Status on filing of the accounting is also set for April 7, 2014. The Court denied the request to order distribution into a CUTMA account. The issue of attorney's fees was continued to April 7, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 by which time Mr. Freedman will need to file papers to request an amount of attorney's fees. The Court stated that there may need to be an allocation of fees. Mr. Freedman is to provide an amended order.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions: 1. To Compel Trustee To Account; 2. Distribution To Minor Cutma; 3. For Payment Of Attorneys Fees
